center.name: 喀丙達省
center.summary: 喀丙達省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Rufous-bellied helmetshrike、安哥拉蓝饰雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: rufiventris is found in southern Cameroon, mainland Equatorial Guinea, south-west Central African Republic, northern and western Gabon, Cabinda and parts of the Republic of Congo and north-western Democratic Republic of Congo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue waxbill occurs in southern Africa from Cabinda and the Congo to Kenya and Tanzania in the east south to northern South Africa
